subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 4: Reading
description: Đọc hiểu về học tập suốt đời trong thế giới hiện đại

theory.title: Reading: Lifelong Learning in the Modern World

sections.heading: Reading Passage: The Power of Lifelong Learning
sections.content:
Lifelong learning has become essential in today's rapidly changing world. Technology evolves so quickly that skills learned in school can become outdated within a few years. Employers increasingly value workers who continuously update their knowledge and adapt to new challenges.

My career counselor told me to embrace lifelong learning early in my career. She advised me to take online courses regularly and recommended that I should earn professional certificates. She also suggested joining professional networks to learn from others. This advice proved invaluable.

Online learning platforms have made education more accessible than ever. Websites like Coursera, edX, and Udemy offer thousands of courses on virtually any topic. My manager asked me to complete a data analysis course last year, and it significantly improved my job performance. The instructor told us to practice daily and encouraged us not to give up when facing difficulties.

However, lifelong learning requires self-discipline and motivation. My mentor warned me not to take on too many courses at once. He advised me to focus on quality rather than quantity and suggested setting realistic goals. He also offered to help me create a learning plan.

The benefits of continuous learning extend beyond career advancement. Learning new skills boosts confidence, keeps the mind sharp, and opens doors to new opportunities. Whether you're learning a new language, mastering a technical skill, or exploring a hobby, the key is to stay curious and committed. My teacher always told me that learning is a journey, not a destination.

exercises.question: What is the main idea of the passage?
options: Lifelong learning is essential in the modern world
Learning is only for young people
exercises.explanation: Ý chính là học tập suốt đời quan trọng trong thế giới hiện đại.

exercises.question: What did the career counselor advise?
options: To take online courses and earn certificates
exercises.explanation: Cố vấn khuyên tham gia khóa học trực tuyến và lấy chứng chỉ.

exercises.question: Which platforms are mentioned for online learning?
exercises.explanation: Coursera, edX và Udemy được đề cập.

exercises.question: What did the mentor warn about?
options: Not to take on too many courses at once
exercises.explanation: Người cố vấn cảnh báo không nên tham gia quá nhiều khóa học cùng lúc.

exercises.question: According to the passage, what does lifelong learning require?
exercises.explanation: Học tập suốt đời đòi hỏi tự kỷ luật và động lực.

exercises.question: What did the instructor tell students to do?
exercises.explanation: Giảng viên bảo học sinh luyện tập hàng ngày.

exercises.question: What benefit of learning is NOT mentioned?
exercises.explanation: Làm giàu ngay lập tức không được đề cập.

exercises.question: What did the mentor offer to do?
exercises.explanation: Người cố vấn đề nghị giúp tạo kế hoạch học tập.

exercises.question: According to the passage, why is lifelong learning important?
exercises.explanation: Kỹ năng có thể trở nên lỗi thời nhanh chóng.

exercises.question: What did the teacher say about learning?
exercises.explanation: Giáo viên nói học tập là một hành trình, không phải đích đến.

exercises.question_text: According to the passage, mark True or False:
exercises.explanation: a) True. b) False - Kỹ năng có thể lỗi thời. c) True. d) False - Cần tự kỷ luật.

options: The counselor advised taking online courses.
The mentor suggested taking many courses at once.
exercises.explanation: a) True. b) False - Không nên quá nhiều. c) True. d) False - Khuyến khích không bỏ cuộc.
a) True. b) False - Rất dễ tiếp cận. c) True. d) False - Còn nhiều lợi ích khác.

exercises.question_text: What type of learning is discussed? (two words)
exercises.explanation: Lifelong learning - học tập suốt đời.
Coursera là một trong các nền tảng được đề cập.

exercises.question_text: What does lifelong learning require? (two words)
exercises.explanation: Self-discipline - tự kỷ luật.

exercises.question: What improved the writer's job performance?
exercises.explanation: Hoàn thành khóa học phân tích dữ liệu cải thiện hiệu suất công việc.

exercises.question: What should learners focus on according to the mentor?
exercises.explanation: Nên tập trung vào chất lượng hơn là số lượng.

exercises.question: What keeps the mind sharp?
exercises.explanation: Học kỹ năng mới giúp trí óc minh mẫn.

exercises.question: What is the key to lifelong learning?
exercises.explanation: Chìa khóa là duy trì sự tò mò và cam kết.
